title: Aurora, 33907, Palm Pals Junie Daisy 5In, Soft Toy, Brown & White
features: Introducing the Palm Pals Junie Daisy Soft Toy, the latest addition to Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This adorable plush is a cute Daisy flower in a brown-coloured smiling flower pot. It's filled with beans and perfectly fits into your palm. It's great for small cuddling and makes a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Junie Daisy is part of the Palm Pals Whimsical collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Craving, Aquatic, Zoo, Barn and many more. These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and feature inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

The Palm Pals Junie Daisy is suitable from birth and measures 13cm. Junie is the definition of an extrovert and loves to be surrounded by many friends. One friend is never enough for Junie; two, three, or even ten is much better to be around. You can usually find Junie at any social gathering or party as Junie knows everyone, and everyone knows Junie. This friendly Daisy is sure to win everyone's hearts!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
